title: UNODC Support NDLEA - FinancialEDGE
description: Photos: Agency Secretary, Shadrach Haruna joined by the Director of Prosecution and Legal Services, Josephine Obi to receive some IT equipment presented by Baranaye Marcus of the United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC) as part of the US Department of State's Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (US INL) support to
html: Photos: Agency Secretary, Shadrach Haruna joined by the Director of Prosecution and Legal Services, Josephine Obi to receive some IT equipment presented by Baranaye Marcus of the United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC) as part of the US Department of State’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs (US INL) support to the Government of Nigeria under the project “Strengthening the Forensic Chemical analysis Capacity of the National Drug Enforcement Agency (NDLEA)” at the Agency’s National Headquarters in Abuja on Friday 8th March 2024
